violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

Raw animal foods (such as meat) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cheese) in the deli-display unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated raw meat. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 25 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC added additional chlorine and retested. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

The door to the outside, located in the storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025

Inspector observed non-food grade plastic containers being used with direct contact with various food items. PIC informed to replace containers with food grade containers. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

Wood is used in the construction of shelf/table in the dishwashing area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

Meat pies and potato balls was observed held at (109-119) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Reheated Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023

Various dairy products was observed held at (44-46) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023

Several beverages and food product were observed stored on the floor in the retail and walk in cooler area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2023

The deli display cooler in the front retail area is in poor repair(ambient temperatures 46-50 degrees Fahrenheit. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair.PIC informed technician during the inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023
